dossier_boundary: prior review and unchanged evidence packet only
reviewer_independence: role separation declared for fixture; independence not externally established
adversarial_probes: check whether repeated review is laundering a rejected claim
unchanged_evidence_guard: block repeated promotion unless new evidence or corrected mapping is supplied
retrieval_expansion_policy: require named missing evidence before expansion
dissent: No dissent recorded in this fixture.
required_actions: supply new evidence or corrected mapping before review can reopen
human_adjudication: required only if new evidence changes the dossier
